[baseline_no_context]                     3  4  3  3  4   "Response is generic without specifics but aligns somewhat well with the role of an old royal guard who might be suspicious yet fair in procedure."

The response maintains a high level of persona consistency and naturalness, fitting for an old royal guard with suspicion towards strangers while still being relevant to the context. The overall quality is good but could be improved slightly by adding more detail about why immediate access might not always be granted without proper cause or credentials.
